params.flavor: A jack of all trades, bound to none.
params.description: The default class. No specialization, no restrictions, no bonuses. Pick this when you want to play the game without committing to a path.
params.initiateFlavor: You've taken the first steps. The road is long.
params.adeptFlavor: Mountains crossed, rivers forded. The world begins to know you.
params.masterFlavor: Few paths remain that you have not walked.
